Home / Blog / Professional Pickleball Paddle&#58; What the Pros Use

Professional Pickleball Paddle&#58; What the Pros Use

By Billy Walters • 7/26/2024
news-and-updates

Professional pickleball players lean on paddles that offer precision, power, and advanced designs. Anna Leigh Waters yields the Paddletek ALW-C, known for its speed, power, and net versatility. Other top players like Catherine Parenteau and Parris Todd prefer Selkirk paddles, while Joola and Paddletek are favored by many. These brands incorporate cutting-edge technologies like Carbon Charger and SuperCore for enhanced performance. Collaborations between professionals and manufacturers yield high-performance designs. To gain insights into the precise details and preferences of these elite players, explore further into the world of professional pickleball paddles.

Key Takeaways

  • Top players like Anna Leigh Waters, Catherine Parenteau, and Parris Todd use brand-specific paddles with cutting-edge technologies.
  • Brands such as Joola, Selkirk, and Paddletek are popular among professional players for their performance and design.
  • Pros often collaborate with manufacturers to develop high-performance paddles tailored to their specific playing styles.
  • Paddles chosen by professionals prioritize control, power, and spin, ensuring enhanced competitive performance.

Top Players and Their Gear

Many top professional pickleball players choose specific paddles to optimize their performance on the court. The paddle they use often reflects their unique style and playing preferences. For instance, Anna Leigh Waters, a dominant force in women's pickleball, relies on her Paddletek ALW-C paddle, known for its light, fast, and powerful performance. Other top players like Catherine Parenteau and Parris Todd opt for Selkirk paddles, which are renowned for their cutting-edge technology and superior control.

The variety of paddles used by professionals underscores the importance of equipment innovation in enhancing game performance. Brands like Joola, Selkirk, and Paddletek are popular among top players due to their technological advancements. For example, Joola's Generation 3 paddles have been praised for their superior performance and innovative design.

These advancements not only benefit professional players but also trickle down to recreational players who seek to improve their game. As the sport continues to evolve, it is predicted that paddle innovation will play a significant role in shaping the future of professional pickleball.

Paddles for Ultimate Control

Paddles for Ultimate Control

Several professional pickleball players opt for paddles designed to provide optimal control, highlighting the role of equipment choices in competitive success. These paddles are engineered with innovative technologies and customization options to enhance playability.

  • Selkirk Vanguard Power Air Invikta: Known for its SuperCore and Aero-DuraEdge Edgeless technology, providing exceptional control and durability.
  • Engage Pursuit Pro1: Designed for precision and power, this paddle has a unique shape and advanced materials to help players dominate the court.
  • Selkirk Catherine Parenteau VANGUARD Power Air Invikta: A signature paddle offering exceptional control and precision, chosen by Catherine Parenteau, a top-ranked player.

These paddles showcase how professional players seek optimal control through advanced technologies and tailored designs, enhancing their competitive performance.

Powerhouses of Pickleball

Powerhouses of Pickleball

Some of the most celebrated names in professional pickleball, including Anna Leigh Waters, Ben Johns, and Catherine Parenteau, have built their reputations on mastering paddles that deliver exceptional power and control, often collaborating with manufacturers to tailor their equipment to their unique playing styles. These powerhouses of pickleball have emerged through rigorous skill development, honing their techniques to extract maximum spin, speed, and precision from their trusted paddles.

Rising stars such as Alix Truong and Allyce Jones are also making a name for themselves with their exceptional talent and strategic equipment choices. Truong's Engage Pursuit Pro1, designed for overpowering opponents, and Jones' CRBN 2X 14mm, focused on unparalleled spin control, exemplify the innovative partnerships between pros and manufacturers. These collaborations yield high-performance paddles that not only elevate the professional game but also inspire amateur players to refine their skills and pursue their own success in the sport.

JOOLA Perseus 3 Advantage

When it comes to professional-grade pickleball paddles, the JOOLA Perseus 3 stands out not only for its reputation as the choice of the world's number one player, Ben Johns, but also for its innovative design and technological advancements.

This paddle's exceptional playability can be attributed to its cutting-edge Propulsion Core technology, Charged Carbon surface, and perfectly weighted design.

Power Generation

Power Generation

The JOOLA Perseus 3 offers unparalleled power generation, distinguishing itself from other high-performance paddles due to its exceptional propulsion core and exponential power delivery. This advanced technology ensures that players can harness and utilize power effectively across various shots.

The Perseus 3 features a patent-pending design that supplies immense force on drives and returns, while maintaining control on resets, drops, and dinks.

The propulsion core transforms every swing into a formidable attack, allowing players to dominate the net and dictate rallies.

Carefully crafted distribution allows for enhanced power without sacrificing maneuverability, making the Perseus 3 equally effective on both aggressive and control shots.

The grip shape and material have been engineered to provide a comfortable, confident feel, ensuring that players can consistently unlock the full potential of the Perseus 3.

Play Control

Optimized handling and responsiveness are key enhancements of the JOOLA Perseus 3, distinguishing it from other high-performance paddles. This advanced design combines exceptional player feel with unparalleled control, enabling proficient players to capitalize on delicate shots and impressively maneuver the ball.

The Perseus 3's finely-tuned sensitivity and precision amplify a player's technique, translating every subtle movement into formidable output.

The sheer versatility of the JOOLA Perseus 3 stems from its adept balance of power and finesse, allowing elite players to transition seamlessly between assertive drives and deft touch volleys. This remarkable blend guarantees that the paddle's responsiveness remains consistent across various playing styles, empowering players to unleash their full potential.

The exquisite feel of the Perseus 3 fosters a strong connection between a player's technique and the ball, refining even the most intricate plays into masterful displays.

Weight Optimization

Weight Optimization

The JOOLA Perseus 3 boasts an exceptional average weight of 8.2 ounces, which is a result of careful design and material selection, allowing for enhanced maneuverability without compromising power and control. This strategic weight optimization is a key factor in the Perseus 3's success among professional players. The paddle's weight distribution is thoughtfully balanced to provide stability and responsiveness for players seeking precision and finesse.

The Perseus 3's weight can be tailored to suit individual player preferences through the use of lead tape or grip adjustments, ensuring an optimal playing experience.

The Perseus 3's edgeless design reduces weight and enhances maneuverability, making it ideal for players who value quick reactions and precise control.

The paddle's carbon fiber composition contributes to its precision and durability, allowing for consistent performance even at high levels of play.

The JOOLA Perseus 3 has garnered significant support from professional players, including Collin Johns, who swears by its exceptional performance and customization capabilities.

Engage Pursuit Pro1 Edge

The Engage Pursuit Pro1 Edge is a powerhouse of a paddle, optimized for professional players seeking to exploit the highest levels of performance.

Its sleek, aerodynamic shape design significantly enhances hand speed, allowing for both maximum power delivery and precision control.

This paddle's innovative MachPro Polymer Core technology ensures unmatched hold time at point of contact, resulting in enhanced spin and control on every shot.

Maximum Power Delivery

Maximum power delivery is redefined in advanced pickleball paddles like the Engage Pursuit Pro1, which leverages enhanced aerodynamics and cutting-edge materials to ensure quick hand speed and explosive spin. This innovative design helps players unleash their full potential on the court, allowing for more aggressive and precise shots.

Key features that contribute to this paddle's exceptional power delivery include:

  • Aerodynamic Shape: Specially designed to increase swing speed and optimize the sweet spot, enhancing court speed dynamics and overall performance.
  • MachPro Core and Raw Toray T700 Carbon Fiber: Combining maximum power and spin with unparalleled dwell time and friction, ensuring that every shot packs a punch.
  • Variable Release 2.0 Technology: This advanced tech allows for greater flex at higher swing speeds, generating increased power and electrifying spin.

This remarkable combination of advanced materials and innovative design elements creates a formidable pickleball paddle that craves power and speed in the hands of skilled players.

Aerodynamic Shape Design

Professional Pickleball Paddle: What the Pros Use

Aerodynamic Shape Design

Enhancing swing speed efficiency, the aerodynamic shape design of the Engage Pursuit Pro1 positions it for exceptional performance in both speed and control. This paddle's thoughtful design ensures minimal air resistance to optimize airflow, leading to a seamless swing and precise shots. By creating a streamlined shape, players can maximize their power while maintaining precision and feel.

The Engage Pursuit Pro1 boasts a sleek, modern design that not only looks impressive but also delivers on gameplay. Its cutting-edge aerodynamics ensure that airflow is optimized throughout the swing arc, reducing drag and improving the overall efficiency of each stroke. This design advantage allows players to generate more power without sacrificing control, making the Pursuit Pro1 a top choice among professional pickleball players seeking to improve their gameplay.

The precise attention to aerodynamic details sets the Engage Pursuit Pro1 apart from its competitors, providing its users a competitive edge through enhanced speed and precision.

Enhanced Spin and Control

Enhanced Spin and Control with Professional Pickleball Paddles

By integrating advanced edge technology and a strategic pattern of surface dimples, the Engage Pursuit Pro1 Edge optimizes spin and control to significantly enhance performance, making it a highly sought-after feature among professional pickleball players.

This paddle's novel design not only boosts power and control but also addresses the specific needs of each player.

Controlled Dynamics: The unique dimple pattern and advanced edge technology work synergistically to create exceptional stability and control during shots.

Dampened Vibration: The ergonomic grip and optimized material distribution ensure a reduced racket feel during impact, allowing for more precise and consistent play.

Spin and Power: The combination of spin-friendly dimples and contemporary edge technology permits players to generate an enhanced level of spin while still maintaining the power to outmaneuver opponents.

Personalized Performance: The versatile construction and expertly tuned components enable pickleball players to adjust their game according to their personal style and preferences.

Combining all these key features, the Engage Pursuit Pro1 Edge brings enhanced spin and control to the fingertips of professional pickleball players, making it an invaluable addition to their arsenal.

Zane Navratil's Signature Paddle

Zane Navratil, the 2022 number one men's pro, has collaborated with ProXR to design his signature paddle, featuring a unique blend of cutting-edge technology and exceptional playability. This top-of-the-line paddle boasts advanced paddle technology, incorporating T700 Ultra-Raw Carbon that provides extreme spin and unmatched durability. Additionally, the paddle boasts a 6-inch elongated handle, which allows for greater power and maneuverability on the backhand.

The ProXR Zane Navratil Signature Paddle also features a Shock Foam Edge Guard, which disperses vibration for better consistency on miss-hit balls. The core material is a PP Honeycomb, ensuring consistent power while enhancing control. Zane's paddle customization takes into account his playing style, which focuses on both power and finesse.

Its stated weight is +/- 8.2 ounces, making it suitable for a wide range of players. With a length of 16.5 inches and a width of 7.5 inches, the paddle offers excellent court coverage. Furthermore, it is USA Pickleball approved, ensuring it meets the highest standards of the sport while remaining legal for all levels of play.

Balancing Power and Spin

A critical component of elite-level pickleball is successfully balancing power and spin, a delicate interplay that Zane Navratil's signature paddle achieves with its precise design. Crafted with the finest materials, this paddle ensures optimal performance by integrating a T700 Raw Carbon Fiber hitting surface, a Polypropylene Honeycomb core, and a Shock Foam Perimeter. This configuration not only generates unmatched power but also allows for exceptional spin control.

Key features that facilitate this balance include:

  • T700 Raw Carbon Fiber : Provides exceptional grip and dwell time, translating to enhanced spin potential.
  • Polypropylene Honeycomb Core : Delivers reliable power while maintaining excellent ball control.
  • Shock Foam Perimeter : Reduces vibrations, ensuring consistent and accurate strokes.

Optimizing Paddle Performance

To maximize the potential of professional pickleball paddles, a comprehensive understanding of the intricate technologies at play is crucial. The design and composition of these elite paddles play critical roles in optimizing performance on the court. By utilizing advanced materials and engineering techniques, professional pickleball paddles can achieve exceptional power, spin, and control.

Composition is a key factor in paddle performance. High-end paddles often feature advanced materials like T700 raw carbon fiber and high-quality cores to minimize vibration and enhance durability. Additionally, sophisticated technologies such as Aero-DuraEdge Edgeless technology provide superior aerodynamics and shock absorption, ensuring a smooth and responsive feel for players.

Optimizing paddle performance also involves a deep understanding of the subtle nuances in design. Features like extended handles and optimized core thickness enable professionals to finely tune their game. By combining cutting-edge materials, innovative designs, and expert craftsmanship, professional pickleball paddles deliver unmatched results, allowing top players to push the boundaries of the sport.

Advanced Materials and Design

Advanced construction techniques, incorporating innovative materials and optimized component placement, are essential to crafting high-performance pickleball paddles that meet the demands of professional play. This pursuit of innovation has led to the development of cutting-edge materials and designs that enhance paddle performance, offering players improved power, control, and precision.

Key advancements include:

  • Advanced Polymer Cores: Engineers' use of advanced polymer cores has led to improved balance between power, control, and responsiveness in modern paddles.
  • Noise Dampening: Specialized core and surface designs minimize the sound generated upon ball impact, making game play more comfortable without compromising performance.
  • Thermoformed Paddles: Thermoforming allows for intricate designs, complex shapes, and precise construction, offering players a wider range of customization options and enhanced playability.

These innovations demonstrate a commitment to enhancing the pickleball experience for professionals and recreational players alike. By embracing advanced materials and design, manufacturers are pushing the boundaries of what is possible in pickleball paddle technology.

Conclusion

Top Players and Their Gear

Professional pickleball players, including Anna Leigh Waters, Alix Truong, and Ben Johns, rely on high-performance paddles designed to their specifications. These paddles offer optimal spin, power, touch, and feel to enhance their games.

Paddles for Ultimate Control

Brands like Paddletek and JOOLA create signature models that cater to the unique demands of these top athletes.

Powerhouses of Pickleball

JOOLA Perseus 3 Advantage

Engage Pursuit Pro1 Edge

Zane Navratil's Signature Paddle

Balancing Power and Spin
